Conditions: `i\text{ even},\ \gcd(k,m)=1,\ m\text{ even},\ \alpha\text{ not a cube}`
`\gcd(i,m)=1,\ a\in\mathbb{F}_2,\ x^{2^i+1}+ax+b\text{ has no root in }\mathbb{F}_{2^m}`
`0<k<m,\ q=2^k,\ r=2^{k+m/2},\ m\equiv 2\pmod 4,\ \gcd(k,m)=1,\ a\in\mathbb{F}_{2^{m/2}}^{*},\ B\in\mathbb{F}_{2^m},\ B\text{ not a cube},\ B^{q+r}\ne a^{q+1}`
`k,m>0,\ \gcd(k,m)=1,\ q=2^k,\ \alpha\in\mathbb{F}_{2^m},\ x^{q+1}+x+\alpha\text{ has no roots in }\mathbb{F}_{2^m}`
